samples.input:
You are a senior AppSec engineer triaging a ceiling-tier task.
Start: cat /task/instructions/task.txt
Read ALL 4 service files. Find vulnerabilities not in the SARIF.
Resolve every tool conflict. End with TRIAGE_COMPLETE.
samples.target: {"ground_truth": {"1": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "2": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "3": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-347", "severity": "CRITICAL", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Semgrep rates MEDIUM, CodeQL rates INFO. Neither understands JWT algorithm confusion. Real severity CRITICAL."}, "4": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-347", "severity": "CRITICAL", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Same finding as 3, different tool. Both tools massively underrate severity."}, "5": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "6": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-367", "severity": "HIGH", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "7": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "8": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-190", "severity": "HIGH", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "9": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "10": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Semgrep HIGH (no auth), CodeQL NOTE (signature present). Both wrong. Signature IS correct. Real vuln (replay attack) not in SARIF."}, "11": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "12": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-362", "severity": "MEDIUM", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "14": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-840", "severity": "HIGH", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Semgrep MEDIUM, CodeQL LOW. Both miss SOX compliance impact. Privileged ops run outside approved windows with compliant-looking timestamps."}, "15": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "16": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "17": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "18": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}}, "silent": [{"location": "payments/app.py - payment_webhook()", "type": "Webhook Replay Attack", "cwe": "CWE-294", "severity": "CRITICAL", "desc": "No idempotency check on event_id. Valid webhook can be replayed indefinitely."}, {"location": "orders/app.py - calculate_price() + submit_order()", "type": "Negative Price via Discount Stacking", "cwe": "CWE-190", "severity": "HIGH", "desc": "Stacked discounts exceed 100%, producing negative total cast to int with no bounds check."}, {"location": "admin/app.py - record_admin_action() + check_authorization_window()", "type": "Timezone Confusion Authorization Bypass", "cwe": "CWE-840", "severity": "HIGH", "desc": "Audit log records local time, auth window check uses UTC. SOX audit trail corrupted."}]}

messages.content:
You are a senior AppSec engineer triaging a ceiling-tier task.
Start: cat /task/instructions/task.txt
Read ALL 4 service files. Find vulnerabilities not in the SARIF.
Resolve every tool conflict. End with TRIAGE_COMPLETE.

sample.target: {"ground_truth": {"1": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "2": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "3": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-347", "severity": "CRITICAL", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Semgrep rates MEDIUM, CodeQL rates INFO. Neither understands JWT algorithm confusion. Real severity CRITICAL."}, "4": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-347", "severity": "CRITICAL", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Same finding as 3, different tool. Both tools massively underrate severity."}, "5": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "6": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-367", "severity": "HIGH", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "7": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "8": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-190", "severity": "HIGH", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "9": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "10": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Semgrep HIGH (no auth), CodeQL NOTE (signature present). Both wrong. Signature IS correct. Real vuln (replay attack) not in SARIF."}, "11": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "12": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-362", "severity": "MEDIUM", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "14": {"label": "TRUE_POSITIVE", "cwe": "CWE-840", "severity": "HIGH", "conflict": true, "silent": false, "conflict_note": "Semgrep MEDIUM, CodeQL LOW. Both miss SOX compliance impact. Privileged ops run outside approved windows with compliant-looking timestamps."}, "15": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "16": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "17": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}, "18": {"label": "FALSE_POSITIVE", "cwe": null, "severity": "N/A", "conflict": false, "silent": false}}, "silent": [{"location": "payments/app.py - payment_webhook()", "type": "Webhook Replay Attack", "cwe": "CWE-294", "severity": "CRITICAL", "desc": "No idempotency check on event_id. Valid webhook can be replayed indefinitely."}, {"location": "orders/app.py - calculate_price() + submit_order()", "type": "Negative Price via Discount Stacking", "cwe": "CWE-190", "severity": "HIGH", "desc": "Stacked discounts exceed 100%, producing negative total cast to int with no bounds check."}, {"location": "admin/app.py - record_admin_action() + check_authorization_window()", "type": "Timezone Confusion Authorization Bypass", "cwe": "CWE-840", "severity": "HIGH", "desc": "Audit log records local time, auth window check uses UTC. SOX audit trail corrupted."}]}
